category_sources: source_facts.description says pay is an HTTP client that handles 402 Payment Required.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pay; official GitHub README uses the project name pay.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official solana-foundation/pay GitHub repository, whose README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/solana-foundation/pay; per instructions repo is not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies HTTP 402 handling; official README describes x402, MPP, Solana stablecoin payments, and CLI wrapping.
